summary: Fixed the scheme validation bypass vulnerability in validateLongUrl by uncommenting and re-enabling the protocol allowlist check, making it block non-http/https schemes.
evidence: Uncommented the protocol validation checks in nest-api/src/links/links.service.ts.
NestJS automatically recompiled and restarted the development server.
Added a regression test to nest-api/test/app.e2e-spec.ts to verify javascript: URLs are rejected with a 400 Bad Request.
Ran the e2e test suite, confirming that both / GET and the javascript: regression test pass successfully.
